current_slogan: Polo Ralph Lauren, 美式经典
description_zh: 拉尔夫·劳伦（Ralph Lauren）是世界上最成功的美国生活方式品牌之一，1967年由拉尔夫·劳伦在纽约创立。品牌以诠释美国梦般的精英生活方式著称——马球（Polo）衬衫上的小马标Logo是其最具辨识度的标志，已成为美式学院风和常春藤风格的代名词。拉尔夫·劳伦从一条宽领带起步，逐步扩展至全系列男装、女装、童装和家居产品线。品牌旗下拥有多个子品牌线：高端线Purple Label、Ralph Lauren Collection、中端的Polo Ralph Lauren、休闲的RLX和Denim & Supply等。品牌多次为奥斯卡颁奖典礼、温布尔登网球赛和美国奥运会代表团设计服装。拉尔夫·劳伦也是唯一一位同时获得CFDA终身成就奖和全美人文奖章的设计师。品牌年营收超60亿美元，在全球拥有超过500家直营门店，完美诠释了美式经典与优雅。

languages.en: Ralph Lauren is one of the world's most successful American lifestyle brands, founded in 1967 by Ralph Lauren in New York. Renowned for epitomizing an aspirational American dream lifestyle, the Polo shirt with its iconic pony logo has become synonymous with American preppy and Ivy League style. Starting from a line of wide neckties, Ralph Lauren expanded into full men's, women's, and children's apparel plus home collections. The brand operates multiple sub-labels: luxury Purple Label and Ralph Lauren Collection, mid-range Polo Ralph Lauren, casual RLX, and Denim & Supply. Ralph Lauren has designed costumes for the Oscars, Wimbledon, and US Olympic teams. He remains the only designer to receive both the CFDA Lifetime Achievement Award and the National Medal of Arts. With annual revenue exceeding $6 billion and over 500 directly operated stores worldwide, Ralph Lauren perfectly embodies classic American elegance.
